source: OrcaLoca paper and public GitHub repository
public_artifact_note: The checked repository contains code and SWE-bench Lite paper summary CSV, but no released localization output JSON/JSONL for the 500-instance SWE-bench Verified protocol.

reported_main_result.source_text: Paper reports Function Match Rate 65.33% (196/300) and File Match Rate 83.33% (250/300) on SWE-bench Lite.
